prompts: Cinematic anime realism, luxury cruise engine room with warm warning lights and a dry work area. Theo Sable, a feminine ship band performer in formal stage attire, and Noel Vale, a masculine passenger in elegant evening wear, work together. Theo holds a metal panel steady while Noel uses a repair tool to tighten a bolt. No sparks, no injury, no text, no watermark, stable camera, consistent lighting.

Same continuous engine room shot, cinematic anime realism. Theo Sable maintains a steady hold on the panel with a composed expression. Noel Vale completes the adjustment with the repair tool, the panel clicks securely into place, and the flickering warning lights stabilize to a steady glow. No sparks, no injury, no text, no watermark, consistent character appearance and environment.
